description_long: This house features a boxy, modernist design with a flat roof and a grid-like arrangement of vertical beams on top, suggesting a contemporary architectural influence. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige material, possibly stucco or concrete, with a subtle pattern. The front facade displays a series of square and rectangular windows arranged asymmetrically, and a flat, textured entry platform extends from the main entrance. On one side, there is a large, open rectangular area that could serve as a patio or carport, bordered by low walls. The roof structure is partially open, revealing interior partitions and a sense of layered spatial organization. The overall form is geometric and minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, boxy house with a flat roof, light beige exterior, and asymmetrical windows, featuring an open patio or carport and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, asymmetrical windows, and a flat entry platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open patio or carport area and the layered roof beams.
description_view_2: Rear view with two large rectangular windows and a spacious patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full extent of the patio/carport and the flat roof structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Flat entry platform with no steps, minimalistic door, and no overhang or decorative elements.
